state.title: bench-targets/cli-flags/parseArgs.test.mjs

part.text:
The current parser is broken:
1. It treats all `--` args as booleans, ignoring `--key value` syntax
2. Doesn't handle `--key=value` syntax
3. Positional args go to `_.push()` before checking flags

I'll fix it to handle all cases:

part.text: Still stripping dashes incorrectly. Restructuring logic:

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openrtk-cli-flag-parsing-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/cli-flags/src/parseArgs.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openrtk-cli-flag-parsing-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/cli-flags/src/parseArgs.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/openrtk-cli-flag-parsing-fix-3/repo/bench-targets/cli-flags/src/parseArgs.mjs
@@ -21,27 +21,27 @@
     result[key] = value || true
     i++
     continue
   }
-  if (arg.indexOf('=') === -1) {
-    if (i + 1 < argv.length) {
-      const next = argv[i + 1]
-      if (next && next.indexOf('-') === -1) {
-        const key = arg.slice(2)
-        result[key] = next
-        i += 2
-        continue
-      }
-    }
-    result[arg.slice(2)] = true
+  if (arg.indexOf('=') !== -1) {
+    const eqIndex = arg.indexOf('=')
+    const key = arg.slice(2, eqIndex)
+    const value = arg.slice(eqIndex + 1)
+    result[key] = value || true
     i++
     continue
   }
-  const idx = arg.indexOf('=')
-  const key = arg.slice(0, idx + 1)
-  if (key) {
-    result[key.substr(2)] = arg.slice(idx + 1)
+  if (i + 1 < argv.length) {
+    const next = argv[i + 1]
+    if (next && next.indexOf('-') === -1) {
+      const key = arg.slice(2)
+      result[key] = next
+      i += 2
+      continue
+    }
   }
+  const key = arg.slice(2)
+  result[key] = true
   i++
   continue
 }
 return result

state.title: bench-targets/cli-flags/src/parseArgs.mjs

part.text:
**Fix complete.** The parser was rewritten to support:
- Boolean flags: `--verbose` → `{ verbose: true }`
- Space syntax: `--count 3` → `{ count: '3' }`
- Equals syntax: `--output=dist` → `{ output: 'dist' }`
- Positional args: added to `result._`
- `---` args: treated as positionals
- `-` args: breaks execution

Test passes (1 pass, 0 fails).
